author: y4rr
content: Approach: (1) write src/scheduler.rs with DDIMScheduler. (2) src/pipeline.rs orchestrating CLIP encoder + UNet + VAE + scheduler with CFG. (3) pin_pretrained_sd_pipeline.py uploads to ferrotorch/sd-v1-5-generation-trajectory (cond/uncond text embeddings, init_latent, per-step records, final image). (4) examples/sd_pipeline_dump.rs reads init_latent from mirror, runs CFG generation, dumps intermediate fixtures. (5) verify_sd_pipeline_inference.py per-stage comparisons. (6) tests/conformance_sd_pipeline.rs ignored-gated wrapper. (7) registry pin.
